description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Listing clothing and household items. Mentions garments including miʾzar, qamīs, sarāwil, miqnaʿa. Several entries are preceded by a large open circle and followed by a long horizontal line connecting to the value on the left.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
